# AGENTS.md

## Setup commands
- Install: `pnpm install`

## Test commands
- Run tests: `pnpm test`
- Run build: `pnpm build`
- Run lint: `pnpm lint`
- Run deploy: `pnpm deploy`

## Code style
- Use TypeScript strict mode
- Run prettier

## Safety boundaries
- Never expose credentials

## PR expectations
- Keep changes scoped
